project_pages.description: This section is a curated set of projects I'm particularly proud of.

These are all the projects I worked on outside of schoolwork. All of them were built either as hobby projects or because I had a stupid idea I couldn't let go of (specifically Diamond City Radio which is the best thing I've ever made).
Projects completed during my coursework at Singapore Institute of Technology. There is a pretty decent variety of projects to see here, ranging from embedded projects to actual games.

Projects from my time at Nanyang Polytechnic, covering core game-development fundamentals across C++ and Unity (C#). Most of these projects lack a lot of visual polish, but I am very proud with how they work programmatically.
These are a bunch of small project I worked on to practice programming.
All the projects I worked on will appear here, ranging from game projects to full frontend projects I've worked on over the course of my life.
